signals.headline: Solana $80 April 2026 Prediction Market Odds Surge to 93
signals.raw:
Solana $80 April 2026 Prediction Market Odds Surge to 93.5% from 64% in One Session | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Traders on Lines.com rapidly shifted odds upward, signaling strong market conviction on hitting $80 by month-end despite recent price pressure around $78-$82.[6]

signals.raw: Trump Signals Iran War 'Very Close to Over'; In-Principle Agreement to Extend Ceasefire Beyond April 22 | YES | HIGH confidence**[1][2]
matched_markets: Will the US x Iran ceasefire be extended by April 21, 2026?
US x Iran permanent peace deal by April 22, 2026?
Trump announces end of military operations against Iran by A

signals.headline: **Context**: This follows failed first-round talks on April 12[3], a US naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz starting
signals.raw: **Context**: This follows failed first-round talks on April 12[3], a US naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz starting April 13[1][2][5], and ships breaking through despite enforcement[1][2]. White House denies requesting the extension[4], but Bloomberg confirms both sides seek further ceasefire talks before the current one ends next week[2].
matched_markets: Will the US x Iran ceasefire be extended by April 21, 2026?
Will the White House call a full lid by 6:30PM on April 14?

signals.headline: Solana (SOL) Hits All-Time Record 167 Million Monthly Token Holders Amid Alpenglow Upgrade Hype | YES | HIGH confidence*
signals.raw:
Solana (SOL) Hits All-Time Record 167 Million Monthly Token Holders Amid Alpenglow Upgrade Hype | YES | HIGH confidence**  
This breaking network milestone, reported as of April 14, 2026, coincides with daily non-vote transactions at historic highs of 148 million, fueled by the anticipated Alpenglow consensus upgrade reducing finality to 150 milliseconds.[1]

signals.headline: Interactive Brokers Launches SOL Trading for European Investors via Zero Hash | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Interactive Brokers Launches SOL Trading for European Investors via Zero Hash | YES | MED confidence**  
The brokerage's expansion provides direct Solana access to European users, boosting institutional reach amid 167 million network users, though SOL price remains compressed at ~$82 without breakout.[2]

signals.headline: **Key Confirmation**: President Trump stated the war is "very close to over," citing optimism for diplomacy over militar
signals.raw: **Key Confirmation**: President Trump stated the war is "very close to over," citing optimism for diplomacy over military action, with a second round of talks possible in the next two days, potentially in Islamabad[1]. Regional officials report Washington and Tehran have an "in-principle agreement" to extend the current two-week ceasefire past April 22 for further negotiations[1][2].
matched_markets: Will the US x Iran ceasefire be extended by April 21, 2026?
Will Trump say "Discombobulator" or "Discombobulated" in April?

signals.headline: **Prediction Market Impact**: Positive diplomatic signals and ceasefire extension could shift odds toward de-escalation
signals.raw: **Prediction Market Impact**: Positive diplomatic signals and ceasefire extension could shift odds toward de-escalation in markets on Iran conflict resolution, Trump foreign policy wins, or oil price stabilization, given the blockade's economic stakes[1][2][5]. No full resolution announced; tensions persist with Israel-Lebanon talks and ongoing strikes[5][6].

Trump announces end of military operations against Iran by A
